scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && find src -name '*.js' -o -name '*.js.map' -o -name '*.d.ts' -o -name '*.d.ts.map' | xargs rm -f 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:extension: tsc --pretty false --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --declaration --declarationMap --sourceMap --outDir dist/extension --rootDir src/extension src/extension/index.ts src/extension/collector.ts src/extension/types.ts && cp src/extension/package.json dist/extension/ && cp src/extension/README.md dist/extension/ && cp src/extension/openclaw.extension.json dist/extension/
scripts.ext:install: mkdir -p ~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-tracing && cp -r dist/extension/* ~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-tracing/ && echo 'Extension installed to ~/.openclaw/extensions/openclaw-tracing'
